assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1-2 have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'; Tasks 3-5 have '## Repository\ntrustify-ui'. Two backend tasks and three frontend tasks across both repos.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks are Task 1 and Task 2. Frontend tasks are Task 3, 4, and 5. Task 3 (frontend) depends on Task 2 (backend). All backend task numbers (1, 2) are lower than all frontend task numbers (3, 4, 5).

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 extensively references PatternFly components: 'PatternFly `Select` (single, typeahead variant)', 'PatternFly `Button` (primary variant)', 'PatternFly `Dropdown`', 'PatternFly `ExpandableSection`', 'PatternFly `Badge`', 'PatternFly composable `Table`', 'PatternFly `EmptyState` with `CodeBranchIcon`', 'PatternFly `Skeleton`'. Visual specifications include badge colors (green, red, blue, yellow), Critical severity highlighted background, and exact empty state text. Task 5 also references 'PatternFly's composable `Table` select pattern'.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 3 (trustify-ui) has '## Dependencies\n- Depends on: Task 2 — Add SBOM comparison REST endpoint with integration tests'. Task 2 is a trustify-backend task.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend Task 1 references paths from repo-backend.md: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_package.rs', 'common/src/error.rs'. Backend Task 2 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs', 'tests/api/sbom.rs'. Frontend Task 3 references paths from repo-frontend.md: 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/api/client.ts', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts'. Frontend Task 4 references: 'src/routes.tsx', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/'. Frontend Task 5 references: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx', 'tests/mocks/handlers.ts', 'tests/e2e/sbom-list.spec.ts'. No cross-contamination found.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence:
Task 1: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Task 2: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Task 3: '## Repository
trustify-ui'. Task 4: '## Repository
trustify-ui'. Task 5: '## Repository
trustify-ui'. Each task has exactly one repository name.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All five tasks contain all four required sections: Task 1 has '## Target Branch' (line 7), '## Description' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 51), '## Test Requirements' (line 59). Task 2 has '## Target Branch' (line 7), '## Description' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 38), '## Test Requirements' (line 45). Task 3 has '## Target Branch' (line 7), '## Description' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 47), '## Test Requirements' (line 53). Task 4 has '## Target Branch' (line 7), '## Description' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 57), '## Test Requirements' (line 73). Task 5 has '## Target Branch' (line 7), '## Description' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 36), '## Test Requirements' (line 44).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All 'Files to Modify' paths exist in the manifests: Task 1 modifies 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs' and 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs' (both in repo-backend.md). Task 2 modifies 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs' and 'tests/api/sbom.rs' (both in repo-backend.md). Task 3 modifies 'src/api/models.ts' and 'src/api/rest.ts' (both in repo-frontend.md). Task 4 modifies 'src/routes.tsx' (in repo-frontend.md). Task 5 modifies 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx' and 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.test.tsx' (both in repo-frontend.md). 'Files to Create' entries are new files within existing directories from the manifests (e.g., 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/comparison.rs' under the existing model/ directory, 'src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts' under existing hooks/ directory).

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references specific paths and patterns: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs for the struct definition pattern (derive Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Clone)', 'PackageService', 'AdvisoryService', 'sbom_package and sbom_advisory from entity/src/', 'AppError from common/src/error.rs'. Task 2 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs and get.rs', '.route("/compare", get(compare::handler))', 'Query<CompareParams>', 'tests/api/sbom.rs'. Task 3 references: 'src/api/models.ts alongside existing interfaces', 'src/api/rest.ts following the pattern of existing functions like fetchSboms()', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts and src/hooks/useSbomById.ts'. Task 4 references: 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/PackageTable.tsx'. Task 5 references: 'SbomListPage.tsx', 'FilterToolbar', 'tests/mocks/handlers.ts', 'tests/e2e/sbom-list.spec.ts'.
